items.title: v1.3.0rc21
items.summary: Deprecation Notices AutoDeploy backend is being deprecated. We are aware that earlier model support is a critical priority for many users of TensorRT LLM and are working on agentic approaches to improve time to functional model support in the PyTorch backend. As an early indicator, this was used to release Minimax M3 functional support within the first week of model release. items.title: Where Argentina And Spain Are Scoring Startup Goals
items.summary: We put together a snapshot of recent startup funding tallies and trends for World Cup finalists Spain and Argentina. While neither accounts for a particularly large share of global or even regional investment, both have an intriguing pipeline of recently funded companies. Here's what we found.
items.why_it_matters: Startup funding news (funding, investment).

items.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
items.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
items.why_it_matters: Startup funding news (valuation).

items.title: The Billion-Dollar Seed Isn’t The Deal You Think It Is
items.summary: Despite attention-grabbing AI mega-seed rounds, historical data shows that very large first financings rarely produce venture-scale returns because high entry valuations limit investor upside. Instead, argues guest author Ellie McDonald, the strongest venture outcomes have typically come from capital-efficient startups that raised modest early rounds.
items.why_it_matters: Startup funding news (raised, seed round, valuation).

items.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]
